title: Longest Consecutive Sequence
coreIdea: Find the length of the longest run of consecutive integers in an unsorted array in O(n), by using a hashset for O(1) lookups and only starting a sequence count from numbers that are confirmed sequence-starts (i.e., num-1 doesn't exist in the set).
recognitionCues: asks for longest consecutive sequence, array unsorted
O(n) time explicitly required, ruling out sorting first (which would be O(n log n))
approach: Add all numbers to a hashset. For each number, only start counting a sequence if num-1 is NOT in the set (confirming it's a sequence start, avoiding redundant work). From each valid start, keep checking num+1, num+2... incrementing length while they exist in the set. Track the max length found.
